title: Bedrock UI for java
description: This texture pack changes the classic Java interface to the Bedrock interface.
body:
This texture pack changes the classic Java interface to the Bedrock interface.
>  main menu interface
![main menu interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0974b80345a3dd5d4d761a45db88c35451de263_0.webp)
 settings interface
![settings interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be371ecaee7787e4533b6ae2b180815170a21953_0.webp)

The project will be updated in the future, but most likely updates will be released rarely because I am working on this and other projects alone.
